last_gate.rationale: The plan is clean across all critique dimensions after two iterations. No blocking, unresolved, or addressed-but-unverified flags remain. The 46.49% plan delta in iteration 2 resolved all eight original flags (conformance-inventory ordering, deleted-test-path avoidance, step splitting, export assignment clarity, verification strengthening, and __all__ audit dependency). The plan correctly aligns with the epic North Star: it provides substrate proof (native_program propagation, executor preference, manifest discovery default, registry/validator contract) without claiming final Megaplan report conformance. Compatibility shims are minimal delegations to existing implementations, graph-era symbols are pushed to arnold.pipeline.legacy, and deleted surfaces remain enforced for unrelated modules. Preflight checks all pass. No anchor conflicts detected. Execution can proceed.
last_gate.signals_assessment: Score stable at 0 across 2 iterations. Zero significant flags, zero unresolved flags, zero addressed-but-unverified flags. All five critique categories (issue_hints, correctness, scope, verification, prerequisite_ordering, north_star_alignment) are clear. No recurring critiques. Preflight posture is clean with all checks passing. Robustness level is thorough. The iteration pressure groups (FG-001, FG-002) concern success-criterion verification methods (observe_runtime_logs, subjective_judgment) rather than plan-quality defects and are appropriate for the execution stage to handle.
warnings: Success criteria 5 and 11 require human verification (observe_runtime_logs, subjective_judgment) during execution — these cannot be fully automated in CI and should be explicitly checked during the exec phase.
The test blast radius includes 243 import-graph-dependent tests; a full-suite fallback run will be needed after scoped checks to catch regressions in dependent surfaces.

settled_decisions.decision: arnold.pipeline.builder, arnold.pipeline.registry, and arnold.pipeline.validator are re-export shims delegating to arnold.workflow.*, not physical relocations
settled_decisions.rationale: Prep clarification confirmed this avoids M7's physical relocation scope. M1 provides public-surface compatibility without moving implementation files.

settled_decisions.decision: Discover test coverage goes under tests/arnold/pipeline/, not the deleted tests/_pipeline/ path
settled_decisions.rationale: tests/_pipeline/ remains a deleted legacy path. All new M1 discovery test coverage must land in active test directories to avoid resurrecting a path marked for deletion.

settled_decisions.decision: Graph-era construction/execution symbols (Builder, Registry, validate, Edge, Stage, etc.) are legacy-only exports via arnold.pipeline.legacy
settled_decisions.rationale: The primary arnold.pipeline.__all__ surface contains only native-first or neutral substrate names. Graph-era symbols remain available for compatibility through arnold.pipeline.legacy until M7 purge.

settled_decisions.decision: MEGAPLAN_M6_MANIFEST_DISCOVERY and ARNOLD_NATIVE_RUNTIME become no-op compatibility aliases in M1
settled_decisions.rationale: Manifest discovery and native runtime become unconditional defaults. Old env vars remain parseable as compatibility surfaces but do not gate behavior. ARNOLD_PIPELINE_RUNTIME retains its documented transitional global override role.

settled_decisions.decision: The active monolithic CLI module is arnold_pipelines/megaplan/cli/__init__.py; no file splits to arnold.py/parser.py occur in M1
settled_decisions.rationale: References to split CLI files are aspirational. M1 works within the existing monolithic CLI structure to avoid scope creep into CLI refactoring.

settled_decisions.decision: M1 delivers substrate proof only — native_program, projected shells, route labels, and native traces are dispatch/compatibility substrate, not final Megaplan authoring conformance
settled_decisions.rationale: This aligns with the epic North Star and the megaplan-native-representation-report.md doctrine. Visible Megaplan product semantics in canonical workflow source remain owned by the composition follow-up.

last_gate.orchestrator_guidance: Plan passed gate and preflight. Proceed to finalize.
